allow:
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python3 -c "
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from context_engine.config import Config
from context_engine.dashboard.server import create_app
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile, json

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory\(\) as tmp:
    tmp = Path\(tmp\)
    project_dir = tmp / 'workspace' / 'my-project'
    project_dir.mkdir\(parents=True\)
    config = Config\(storage_path=str\(tmp / 'storage'\)\)
    app = create_app\(config, project_dir\)
    client = TestClient\(app\)
    r = client.post\('/api/reindex', json={'full': True}\)
    print\('reindex status:', r.status_code\)
    print\('reindex body:', r.text\)
    r2 = client.post\('/api/compression', json={'level': 'max'}\)
    print\('compression status:', r2.status_code\)
    print\('compression body:', r2.text\)
")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run python3 -c "
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from context_engine.config import Config
from context_engine.dashboard.server import create_app
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile, json

with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory\(\) as tmp:
    tmp = Path\(tmp\)
    project_dir = tmp / 'workspace' / 'my-project'
    project_dir.mkdir\(parents=True\)
    config = Config\(storage_path=str\(tmp / 'storage'\)\)
    app = create_app\(config, project_dir\)
    client = TestClient\(app\)
    r = client.post\('/api/reindex', json={'full': True}\)
    print\('reindex status:', r.status_code\)
    print\('reindex body:', r.text[:300]\)
    r2 = client.post\('/api/compression', json={'level': 'max'}\)
    print\('compression status:', r2.status_code\)
    print\('compression body:', r2.text[:300]\)
")
